assumptions: On the positive edge of clock signal B (clk_b) or the falling edge of reset signal B (brstn), the module assigns the output data value. If the reset signal B (brstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, the output data (dataout) is set to 0. If the reset signal B (brstn) is high and the control signal (en_clap_two) is active, the output data (dataout) is assigned the value of the data register (data_reg). If the control signal (en_clap_two) is inactive, the output data (dataout) retains its previous value.

checks.description: When data_en is asserted and data_in is stable, dataout should reflect data_in after the two-cycle enable synchronization.
checks.pass_condition: dataout equals the captured data_reg value once en_clap_two becomes high.
checks.trigger_condition: After data_en is asserted and data_in is stable for at least 3 clk_b cycles.

checks.description: Maximum data_in value propagates to dataout after enable synchronization.
checks.pass_condition: When data_in = 0b1111 and data_en asserted, dataout becomes 0b1111 after en_clap_two is high.

checks.description: Do not infer business-level completion or acceptance solely from reset activity.
notes: Clock/reset remain anchors and are not emitted as business outputs.
checks.pass_condition: No safety property is violated by treating reset as control-only; later functional claims require separate post-reset evidence.
checks.trigger_condition: While reset is asserted or being released.

checks.description: Treat reset assertion/release as a control event and require reset-safe interface behavior.
notes: Reset is used as an anchor only; it is not treated as a business output.
checks.pass_condition: No acceptance, completion, or externally visible functional progress is claimed solely during reset; post-release observation waits for stable, externally visible behavior.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset 'arstn' is asserted and later released according to the inferred polarity.

notes: Reset oracle focuses on control-safe behavior instead of value-specific output claims.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: On the positive edge of clock signal A (clk_a) or the falling edge of reset signal A (arstn), the module updates the register. If the reset signal A (arstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, the register (data_reg) is set to 0. If the reset signal A (arstn) is high, the register (data_reg) is updated with the input data signal (data_in).

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: On the positive edge of clock signal A (clk_a) or the falling edge of reset signal A (arstn), the module updates the register. If the reset signal A (arstn) is low, the register (en_data_reg) is set to 0. If the reset signal A (arstn) is high, the register (en_data_reg) is updated with the input enable signal (data_en).

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: The module includes two registers, en_clap_one and en_clap_two, to control the selection of the input data. On the positive edge of clock signal B (clk_b) or the falling edge of reset signal B (brstn), the module updates the registers. If the reset signal B (brstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, both registers (en_clap_one and en_clap_two) are set to 0.

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: If the reset signal B (brstn) is high, the registers (en_clap_one and en_clap_two) are updated based on the value of en_data_reg. The register en_clap_one is assigned the value of en_data_reg, and en_clap_two is assigned the previous value of en_clap_one.

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: On the positive edge of clock signal B (clk_b) or the falling edge of reset signal B (brstn), the module assigns the output data value. If the reset signal B (brstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, the output data (dataout) is set to 0. If the reset signal B (brstn) is high and the control signal (en_clap_two) is active, the output data (dataout) is assigned the value of the data register (data_reg). If the control signal (en_clap_two) is inactive, the output data (dataout) retains its previous value.
